positive: A majestic, symmetrical circular mandala pattern combining deep sapphire blues, glowing gold foil textures, and ethereal emerald greens. The design features intricate celestial motifs, stylized lunar phases, and ornate geometric florals. Clean line art combined with smooth watercolor gradients. Central composition, high contrast, pop art aesthetic, designed for apparel screen print, isolated on clean white background, vector illustration style, seamless repeating pattern potential.
negative: blurry, cropped, low quality, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, messy, rough edges
